title: Create shifts
acceptance_criteria: Shift appears in schedule; validates time window; stored in DB

title: Assign / Override
acceptance_criteria: Assignment persists; conflicts logged; override requires reason

title: Approve swaps
acceptance_criteria: Status changes; notifications sent; admin can leave note

title: Conflicts list
acceptance_criteria: Conflicts page shows double-booking/hour-cap with links

title: Export weekly CSV
acceptance_criteria: Downloadable CSV with hours per student

title: Submit availability
acceptance_criteria: Saved blocks visible; prevents out-of-window assignment

title: Availability CRUD
acceptance_criteria: Students can edit/remove availability; admin can view

title: View schedule
acceptance_criteria: Student sees accurate assigned shifts list/calendar

title: Request swap
acceptance_criteria: Request recorded; target notified; admin approval gating

title: Notifications
acceptance_criteria: Notification appears and is logged when relevant
